channel.title: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD)
channel.description: Daily Feed (Last 48 Hours, Updated 9 AM BD) generated by script

item.title: Brazil’s beloved payments system has drawn Donald Trump’s ire
item.description: But his tariff assault on Pix just makes Brazilians love it—and Lula—more

item.title: China’s new generation of tycoons is its most enigmatic yet
item.description: Their companies are conquering the world—and they hate talking to the press

item.title: China’s mysterious new billionaires are conquering the world
item.description: And refusing to talk to the press

item.title: How India is weathering the energy shock
item.description: And why its troubles may not be over yet

item.title: The Iran war is America’s least popular since polls began
item.description: Support seldom rises for conflicts as they age

item.title: Closing Europe’s dangerous missile gap
item.description: European NATO powers scramble to acquire capabilities as America cuts its help
